Home / Services / Garage Door Maintenance

Garage Door Maintenance

Preventative care to extend your garage door's life in desert conditions.

Las Vegas' dust, heat, and UV radiation accelerate wear on garage door systems. Our bi-annual maintenance program catches small issues before they become expensive repairs—especially important for older homes in the Southwest and Downtown areas.

A typical tune-up includes lubricating all moving parts with high-temperature grease, inspecting cables for fraying (common in windy seasons), testing auto-reverse safety features, and cleaning photo-eye sensors obscured by dust. For newer homes in Henderson's Inspirada community, we often adjust newly settled tracks.

Clients on our maintenance plan receive priority scheduling and discounts on repairs. We'll even remind you when service is due—because we know how easy it is to forget in our busy valley lives.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Full system inspection from springs to opener
  2. 02 Step 2: Lubrication with desert-grade products
  3. 03 Step 3: Safety feature testing and adjustments
  4. 04 Step 4: Detailed report with recommended follow-ups

Benefits

  • Reduces repair costs by up to 60%
  • Extends door life in harsh climate
  • Includes safety check for families
  • Flexible scheduling options

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should my garage door be serviced?

Twice yearly—before summer heat peaks and after monsoon season. Dust storms cause extra wear.

Do you service commercial garage doors?

Yes—we maintain small business and HOA community gates with specialized heavy-duty protocols.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with garage door maintenance? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-gar-r91
